title: Myliobatiformes
content: Myliobatiformes is one of the four orders of batoids, cartilaginous fish es related to sharks. They were formerly included in the order Rajiformes, but more recent phylogenetic studies have shown the myliobatiforms to be a monophyletic group, and its more derived members evolved their highly flattened shapes independently of the skate s. Classification. Nelson's "Fishes of the World" arranges the Myliobatiformes as: The family Aetobatidae is recognised by some authorities. It contains the for the genus "Aetobatus", which is otherwise part of Myliobatinae.
